evals.prompt: Starting new feature: shopping cart redesign. Need design reference before coding. Stitch project doesn't exist yet. How do I generate initial designs?
evals.expected_output: Skill directs Phase 1 (create new project, save ID to stitch.json). Phase 2 generation with design system context (colors, fonts from DESIGN.md). Generates desktop and mobile cart layouts. Phase 4 captures screenshots as e2e-evidence/design-validation/reference/stitch-screen-*.png. Metadata saved for later design-validation comparison step.

evals.prompt: Design system update: accent color changed from blue to purple. Need 3 variants of existing card component to show stakeholders. Which creative range?
evals.expected_output: Skill recommends EXPLORE range (moderate changes) for color variants. Shows generate_variants call with COLOR_SCHEME aspect. Produces 3 screenshots at different purple intensities. Skill explains: REFINE for fine-tuning (opacity tweak), EXPLORE for palette alternatives, REIMAGINE for radically different approaches.
